items.title: ‘The game is gone’ – Fans rage as full line-up for World Cup final half-time show is revealed
items.summary: WORLD CUP fans were not bowled over by the latest addition to the final's half-time show. Organisers had already announced Madonna, Shakira and BTS as their co-headline acts. But Justin Bieber will also be part of the 11-minute spectacle scheduled slap bang in the middle of the New Jersey finale on

items.title: Chris Sutton's World Cup quarter-final predictions
items.summary: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the quarter-final ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Norway.

items.title: Do World Cup 2026 quarter-final ties go to extra-time or straight to penalties if a draw after 90 minutes?
items.summary: THE World Cup is heading for a dramatic climax in North America! Just eight nations remain in the hunt for global glory as the quarter-finals arrive. items.title: Mexico start Márquez era on 'strong foundation'
items.summary: The Mexican Football Federation announced Wednesday that Rafael Márquez is taking the reins as Javier Aguirre's successor to lead the team up to the 2030 World Cup.

items.title: FBI investigators ‘probe Argentina Football over money laundering claims for hundreds of millions of dollars’
items.summary: THE FBI is reportedly probing Argentina’s football bosses over claims hundreds of millions of dollars in sponsorship money were laundered through US banks. items.title: ⚽ World Cup Golden Boot tracker: Messi leads
items.summary: We're into the quarterfinals at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and the race for the Golden Boot -- given to the tournament's top goal scorer -- is red-hot.

items.title: Sources: Utd, Chelsea agree $67M deal for Santos
items.summary: Manchester United have agreed a deal with Chelsea for midfielder Andrey Santos, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Sources: Arsenal to step up Guimarães interest
items.summary: Arsenal are set to step up their interest in Bruno Guimarães after receiving encouragement that the midfielder wants to join them but agreeing a fee with Newcastle remains a significant stumbling block, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Amorim: I made 'mistakes' as Man United boss
items.summary: Ruben Amorim has admitted to making mistakes during his time as Manchester United boss but said he learned a lot during his time at Old Trafford.

items.title: Egypt FA: Can't be silent on Argentina referee cal...
items.summary: The Egyptian FA said it "cannot remain silent regarding the refereeing decisions" following the team's round-of-16 loss to Argentina at the World Cup.

items.title: EU lawmakers eye investigating FIFA's Infantino
items.summary: Dozens of European lawmakers are gathering support to launch an investigation in the European Parliament of FIFA boss Gianni Infantino over his involvement in the decision to permit U.S. striker Folarin Balogun to play despite an earlier red card.

items.title: Best bets for the 2026 World Cup quarterfinal roun...
items.summary: Looking to place some World Cup bets? Take a look at what our expert is considering ahead of the quarterfinal round.

items.title: Inside the 'goalkeepers' union,' where mutual supp...
items.summary: Goalkeepers are unique among soccer players, and so is the supportive bond that (almost) all of them share.
